title: User Permissions
excerpt: Does anyone know the phenomene ? Why can’t I assign a guest to a person column ?

posts.author: Honor (Honor)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know the phenomene ? Why can’t I assign a guest to a person column ?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Honor

You need to change the board type to shareable and it will show this little icon before the board name.

and you need t invite the guest to the board as guest.

Hope that clarifies it.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
